title: HAVENWARE Bug Zapper, 2-in-1 Electric Mosquito Killer & Camping Light, Rechargeable UV Insect Trap with High Voltage Grid, Waterproof Fly Zapper for Indoor Outdoor Use
bullet_points: 2-IN-1 BUG ZAPPER & CAMPING LIGHT - Features a powerful 360° UV light trap with a built-in camping lamp—perfect for patios, tents, bedrooms, and outdoor adventures.
HIGH VOLTAGE ELECTRIC GRID - Instantly zaps mosquitoes and flying insects with a high-voltage electric grid. Safe, efficient, and chemical-free pest control for any setting.
RECHARGEABLE & LONG BATTERY LIFE - Built-in rechargeable battery with extended usage time—ideal for off-grid or backyard use. USB-C fast charging makes it easy to power up.
WATERPROOF & WEATHER-RESISTANT - IPX4-rated waterproof casing ensures reliable performance in rain or damp conditions—built to withstand indoor and outdoor environments.
EASY TO CLEAN & MAINTAIN - Detachable bottom tray collects dead insects for quick disposal. Durable ABS housing resists high heat and ensures long-lasting use.
